value.found_quote: Prompt-build, review-session, and parse failures fail closed.
value.rationale: The claim references an "Auto-review" feature, which the page describes in detail under "Automatic approval reviews" and "Auto-review mode," including routing approval requests through a reviewer agent via `approvals_reviewer = "auto_review"`. The page also mentions "review-session" failures. While the claim's exact phrasing "Auto-review session transcripts" is not used verbatim, the Auto-review offering itself is clearly substantiated as a current feature.
